name: Cyber Resilience Act
description: EU CRA establishes cybersecurity requirements and vulnerability handling obligations for products with digital elements across the lifecycle.

requirements.name: Meet essential cybersecurity requirements for products
requirements.description: Meet essential cybersecurity requirements for products and continuously validate control effectiveness.
